mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT swd.关联来源单号 FROM SETTLEMENT_WASTE_DETAIL swd WHERE swd.关联来源类型 = 'WAREHOUSING' AND swd.关联来源单号 IS NOT NULL AND swd.关联来源单号 IN
#{code}

SELECT swi.废物类别, swi.废物名称, swi.废物代码, COALESCE(SUM(swd.基本结算数量), 0) 累积基本结算数量, COALESCE(SUM(swd.辅助结算数量), 0) 累积辅助结算数量, CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT swd.基本计量单位) = 1 THEN MAX(swd.基本计量单位) ELSE '吨' END 基本计量单位, CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT swd.辅助计量单位) = 1 THEN MAX(swd.辅助计量单位) ELSE NULL END 辅助计量单位 FROM SETTLEMENT s INNER JOIN SETTLEMENT_WASTE_DETAIL swd ON s.结算单编号 = swd.结算单编号 INNER JOIN SETTLEMENT_WASTE_INFO swi ON swd.明细编号 = swi.结算明细编号 WHERE s.合同号 = #{contractCode} AND s.状态 IN ('已审核', '已结算', '已收款', '部分收款')
AND (
(swi.废物类别 = #{item.wasteCategory} AND swi.废物名称 = #{item.wasteName} AND swi.废物代码 = #{item.wasteCode})
)
GROUP BY swi.废物类别, swi.废物名称, swi.废物代码 ORDER BY swi.废物代码
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(金额), 0) FROM SETTLEMENT_WASTE_DETAIL WHERE 结算单编号 = #{settlementId} AND 是否删除 = 0
